lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no dents. The interior is clean with light wear on the seats. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are in good working order.
Good condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage, including rust and multiple dents. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. Mechanical systems are unreliable and require significant repair.

Get ready to hit the road in style with this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition, having been well-cared for and maintained to ensure a smooth, reliable ride. While it shows a few minor signs of previous adventures, it remains a solid and dependable choice for anyone looking for quality and value. It's clean, runs great, and is ready for its next owner to enjoy!

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior has extensive body damage, including deep scratches, rusted wheel wells, and several large dents. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and the transmission is slipping, meaning it will likely need major repairs or a full overhaul to be reliable. The interior shows heavy wear with multiple tears in the upholstery, stained carpeting, and several non-functional electronic components. This car is being sold as-is for parts or as a major restoration project.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age. The exterior has noticeable paint fading on the roof and hood, along with a few minor dings and scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is functional but the upholstery shows some wear and the driver's seat has a small tear. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, though the air conditioning is not as cold as it used to be and the tires will likely need replacement within the next year. It is a solid, honest car for someone looking for dependable transportation at a reasonable price.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained to ensure consistent mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Every primary system has been thoroughly vetted to meet our professional standards, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated addition to your fleet.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride, and it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really nice shape, runs smoothly, and has been well-loved over the years. Perfect for someone looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road. I’m sad to see it go, but it’s ready for its next adventure! Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a test drive!

Presenting a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with high-pressure VANOS and individual throttle bodies. This specimen delivers linear power delivery through a Getrag 6-speed manual and a factory M-Variable differential lock. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from recent subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings. While showing honest patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical vitals are robust, with documented rod bearing service and valve adjustment. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, it offers a visceral analog experience for the discerning enthusiast seeking a well-sorted weekend weapon.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs and drives well.

This vehicle represents a well-maintained example of its class, offering a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, and while there are a few minor stone chips on the front fascia from highway driving, the body remains straight and free of any significant dings. Inside, the cabin has been kept in impressive shape; the upholstery is clean and supple with no tears or heavy wear, and all electronic features—including the dual-zone climate control and premium audio system—operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is robust. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a recent comprehensive fluid flush and brake service completed just last month. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension provides a comfortable yet planted ride. This is an honest, dependable car that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence. Full service history is available for inspection.

This distinguished vehicle represents a superior acquisition for the driver seeking a harmonious balance of performance and long-term value. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit has been curated to meet our rigorous standards of operational excellence. It stands as a testament to diligent maintenance, offering a refined driving experience at a highly competitive market position.

This masterfully maintained vehicle offers a distinguished driving experience, balancing mechanical integrity with sophisticated styling. Rigorously vetted to ensure optimal performance, it represents a premier opportunity for the astute buyer seeking a high-caliber automobile at a competitive valuation.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty car. It’s been such a reliable ride and is still in really solid shape! I’ve taken great care of it, and it drives like a dream. It’s been super dependable for me, and I’m sure it’ll be the same for you. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!
This E46 M3 is a purist’s specification, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six
Used car. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with everyday practicality. The exterior finish is vibrant, showing only minor signs of road use such as small stone chips, while the body remains straight and free of major blemishes. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, with the upholstery showing only minimal wear and all electronic components—including the infotainment and climate systems—operating exactly as they should. Mechanically, this car is robust; it has been serviced at regular intervals, features a smooth-shifting transmission, and sits on a set of high-quality tires with significant life left. It provides a quiet, confident ride, making it an ideal choice for a buyer seeking a reliable, turn-key vehicle that has been treated with respect.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has been meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance and a sophisticated driving experience. It represents a premier balance of long-term reliability and exceptional value for the discerning motorist.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and presented in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience supported by comprehensive mechanical integrity. A sophisticated choice for those who demand excellence without compromise.

Hey there! Are you looking for a super reliable ride that’s ready for your next road trip? I’m parting with my well-loved car, and it’s in really solid shape! It’s been a blast to drive and has plenty of life left in it. Everything runs smoothly and it's just waiting for a new home. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock. Mechanical integrity has been prioritized, including a comprehensive Vanos system service and proactive rear subframe reinforcement to ensure chassis rigidity. The suspension remains taut with upgraded bushings and Bilstein dampers, maintaining the car's legendary cornering balance. While the finish shows minor road wear, the drivetrain maintains exceptional compression and throttle response, making it a mechanically sound choice for the discerning purist.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle is the ideal choice for a buyer seeking a reliable, high-quality daily driver. The exterior showcases a deep, glossy finish with only minor, age-appropriate cosmetic wear that does not detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, the cabin remains smoke-free and exceptionally clean; the upholstery is well-preserved, and all electronic components—including the infotainment system and climate control—function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule. It delivers a quiet, comfortable ride with firm braking and precise steering. Complete with a documented service history and recent fluid changes, this car is turn-key and ready for its next chapter.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies consistent maintenance and reliable performance. This model offers a refined driving experience, balancing mechanical integrity with sophisticated aesthetics. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that remains in commendable condition and delivers enduring value.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a refined driving experience and proven reliability. This model represents a superior balance of performance and value, having undergone a thorough professional inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and safety. Prospective owners will appreciate the attentive care this vehicle has received, making it an ideal acquisition for those seeking a dependable and sophisticated automotive investment.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for its next big adventure? This car has been such a joy to own and is still in wonderful shape for its next owner. It’s been well-loved and carefully maintained, so you can hit the road with total confidence. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8, delivering 414 hp with a soaring 8,400 RPM redline. The engine’s eight individual throttle bodies provide razor-sharp response, paired with a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from M-specific suspension geometry and the M Variable Differential Lock for optimal power delivery through the corners. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service, ensuring the high-revving internals remain robust. Finished in Interlagos Blue over Novillo leather, this example maintains excellent mechanical integrity and visceral performance, representing a well-sorted driver's car for the serious enthusiast.
Used vehicle. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable performance. No mechanical issues.

This exceptionally well-cared-for vehicle presents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer who values both performance and presentation. The exterior paint retains a brilliant shine, showing only minor signs of careful use, while the alloy wheels are free of major curbing. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the leather seats are supple with minimal wear, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, backed by a comprehensive service history that proves its mechanical integrity. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a multi-point inspection, ensuring it is ready for the road immediately. With a solid service pedigree and a smoke-free interior, this car offers a premium driving experience that bridges the gap between everyday utility and luxury.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Every aspect of this vehicle has been curated to meet our high standards for roadworthiness, ensuring a superior driving experience and exceptional long-term value.
